scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent; if (!ua || ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) process.exit(0); console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1)" && rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
